nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Kunigunde von Beichlingen was born about 1095, in Europe, her father, Graf Kuno von Beichlingen, was 45 and her mother, Kunigunde von Weimar-Orlamünde, was 41. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg. She died on 8 June 1140, at the age of 46.

Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg. Elle est décédée le 8 juin 1140, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Kunigunde von Beichlingen(이)가 대략 1095년 우럽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Kuno von Beichlingen(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kunigunde von Weimar-Orlamünde(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Diepold III. Markgraf von Vohburg(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1140년 6월 8일 46세의 나이로 사망했다.
